title: Galaxy Watch Fe 40Mm Black Bluetooth Sm R861Nzkamea
features: Stay fit in style with the daily companion on your wrist

Available in three new colors—Black, Pink Gold, and Silver—with new stitch bands to match each, Galaxy Watch FE is the perfect complement to your outfit, whether it's casual, streetwear, or workout gear.
Sapphire crystal glass: durability redefined
Crafted with sapphire crystal glass, Galaxy Watch FE withstands scratches and drops. It's also dust-proof and splash-resistant—ideal for wearing throughout your daily activities.
One-click band: switch your watch band in a snap
Simply press the release button on the one-click band to detach your current watch band and attach a new one. With multiple watch bands to choose from, find the one that matches your vibe!
It's all about wellness and beyond
Level up your game with Galaxy Watch FE's advanced fitness tracking
Body composition measurement made easy
Measure your body composition right from your wrist and set achievable fitness goals to better yourself every day.
It's about time you crush some fitness goals
Galaxy Watch FE is more than a watch; it’s a personal trainer that watches over your performance and motivates you with reward badges and uplifting messages to keep pushing forward.
Fitness tracking: document your health journey

Galaxy Watch FE tracks over 100 workouts, from yoga to swimming and even custom moves. Forgot to start the timer? No problem. Whether you're running, walking, or biking, it automatically recognizes and logs your activity.
Counting every mile
Analyze your running posture and pace with Galaxy Watch FE, and train across five intensity levels to improve your running performance.
Samsung Health, now on your wrist

The key features of the Samsung Health app on Galaxy Watch FE provide detailed insights into your overall body condition. Use the Samsung Health app, now conveniently on your wrist, to stay healthy and set new records.
Sleep coaching: helping you get quality sleep every night
Good rest is key to living your best life, and it starts with understanding your sleep habits. Galaxy Watch FE analyzes your sleep patterns to help you rest, ensuring safety and comfort.
Heart monitoring package: always on watch

Find peace of mind with Galaxy Watch FE's heart monitoring package. The built-in PPG sensor in this intelligent timepiece periodically measures your heart rate and instantly alerts you if it is too high or too low. If irregularities are detected, Galaxy Watch FE prompts you to conduct a detailed ECG examination of your heart rhythm, helping you manage the risk proactively.
Fall detection: in case you need urgent help
Fall Detection sends an SOS when it detects a fall. You can instantly access your medical info from the lock screen to help emergency services.
Customize it: your watch, your vibe
Personalize your Galaxy Watch FE to express your style. Choose from a wide range of bands in various styles and materials, along with unique watch faces, to make a statement.
Snap brilliance from your wrist with camera control

Galaxy Watch FE's camera control lets you preview your shots on the watch display before capturing your treasured moments. When your Galaxy Z Flip is in Flex Mode, the camera icon automatically appears on the watch face, allowing you to switch between photo and video modes and take pictures from your wrist.

specifications.Sensors: Accelerometer, Barometer, Bioelectrical Impedance Analysis Sensor, Electrical Heart Sensor, Gyro Sensor, Geomagnetic Sensor, Light Sensor, Optical Heart Rate Sensor
specifications.Audio Playing Format: MP3, M4A, 3GA, AAC, OGG, OGA, WAV, AMR, AWB
